name: Electric Beach
tagline: A power plant warm-water outflow creates a fish and turtle magnet unlike anything else on Oahu.
parking: Roadside parking along Farrington Hwy past Ko Olina
bestTime: Morning for best visibility and calmer current
insiderTips: Not for beginners — strong current near the warm-water outflow pipe. Enter from the sandy area to the right, not over the rocks. Dolphins frequently spotted in the deeper water offshore. Bring your own gear (no rentals nearby). The warm water from the power plant attracts an unusually dense concentration of fish and turtles year-round.
